personal.preferred_title: Python AI Solutions Engineer | GenAI, RAG & Data Platform Automation

summary: Senior technology engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience spanning financial-services data platforms, Python automation, production support, observability, and AI-assisted engineering workflows. Strong hands-on background with Python, SQL, ETL/data pipelines, telemetry analytics, REST API consumption, Docker, CI/CD concepts, and operational reliability in regulated environments. Built agentic AI and RAG-style workflows using LLM APIs, FAISS/vector embeddings, JSON contracts, quality gates, and automated artifact generation. Well aligned to Python-based GenAI product engineering roles that require practical delivery, documentation, troubleshooting, and cross-functional collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported production Python/Pandas data pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with repeatable, monitored data processing routines.
Designed governed datasets and SQL reporting layers for financial-services infrastructure teams, emphasizing data quality, reconciliation, auditability, and operational decision support.
Developed ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to identify capacity bottlenecks months ahead, connecting curated telemetry data to predictive analytics use cases.
Built AWS-based data platform components using S3, Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud-oriented pipeline patterns to modernize on-premise analytics workloads.
Integrated data from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines and dashboards used by technical and leadership stakeholders.
Created Streamlit and Python visualization/reporting tools to surface real-time capacity insights, operational risk, and infrastructure utilization trends.
Supported production incident analysis, issue triage, root-cause investigation, and workflow improvements across data pipelines, monitoring systems, and reporting outputs.
Applied secure and reliable delivery practices in a regulated banking environment, including documentation, repeatable processes, stakeholder communication, and data governance awareness.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for revenue-critical web and mobile systems, improving visibility into customer experience and application behavior.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across digital systems, supporting troubleshooting, performance analysis, and operational improvement.
Partnered with engineering teams during AWS migration planning, providing observability and performance-readiness analysis for cloud transition decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules that standardized monitoring and issue-resolution workflows.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation scripts for recurring performance data extraction and reporting, reducing manual operational effort.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and operations teams to troubleshoot bottlenecks, analyze telemetry, and document root-cause findings.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction processing logic, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining mission-critical response behavior.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic workflow that scores jobs, detects semantic duplicates, generates tailored artifacts, applies JSON quality gates, and tracks application workflow state.

projects.name: RAG Answer Contract POC Series
projects.description: Designed and implemented RAG-oriented proof-of-concepts with retrieval, evidence selection, answer contracts, schema validation, and quality gates for grounded outputs.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, turning raw infrastructure data into curated forecasting datasets and decision-support dashboards.
